net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar

Class SimulationHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar.SimulationHandler

  • public class SimulationHandler
extends java.lang.Object
    This class runs and handles the a star algorithm an simulation.
    Author:
    marc.engelmann

        dimensions - is the dimension vector
